Hello everyone, welcome to today's meeting. Today we'll be discussing the third quarter sales report.
Okay, thank you. According to the data, our total revenue for the third quarter reached twenty-five million dollars, an increase of fifteen percent compared to the same period last year.
That growth rate is very impressive. Could you go into more detail about the performance in each region?
Of course. The Asia-Pacific region performed the best, growing by twenty-two percent. North America grew by ten percent. Europe remained essentially flat.
I noticed that sales of artificial intelligence products have been growing particularly fast. Can this trend continue?
We expect that AI-related products will continue to maintain strong growth next quarter. Customer demand for real-time translation and speech recognition is increasing.
